title: Day By Day Returns
content:
Day by day returns
    The everlasting sun,
    Replenishing material urns
    With God's unspared donation;
    But the day of day,
    The orb within the mind,
    Creating fair and good alway,
    Shines not as once it shined.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Day By Day Returns"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
